headline: Founder of AgentMark building LLM observability, prompt management, and reliable agent tooling.
title: Founder
confidenceNote: Cal.com, GitHub, Meetup, Clutch, and New Hampshire startup sources consistently identify Ryan Randall as the Dover-based founder of AgentMark.
bioMarkdown: Founder of AgentMark, a git-based platform for building reliable AI agents with prompt management, evals, observability, and analytics. Useful match for conversations about agent engineering workflows, LLMOps, developer tooling, and startup community building.

primary.label: GitHub: kocobee
primary.note: Public profile identifies Ryan Randall as founder of AgentMark and maintainer of AgentMark projects.

primary.note: Public booking page describes him as founder of AgentMark.co and focused on giving LLMs superpowers.

primary.note: First-person founder profile for AgentMark, including background in engineering, DevRel, software architecture, CMS, and LLMOps.

secondary.note: Event listing names Ryan Randall as AgentMark CEO and NH Entrepreneurs founder speaking on reliable JavaScript agents.

secondary.label: Clutch: AgentMark review
secondary.note: Verified review identifies Ryan Randall as founder of AgentMark in Dover, New Hampshire.

headline: Founder and CEO of Savante training specialist open models with reinforcement learning.
title: Founder & CEO
confidenceNote: Savante, LinkedIn, LinkedIn company data, and Aryabhata research sources consistently connect Sachin Dharashivkar to Savante and specialist-model post-training work.
bioMarkdown: Founder and CEO of Savante, focused on RL post-training open models into domain specialists. He collaborated on Aryabhata 1.0 for JEE mathematics and brings prior reinforcement-learning experience across trading, games, and agentic systems.

primary.label: Savante
primary.note: Company site lists Sachin Dharashivkar as CEO and describes Savante's custom specialist model training work.

primary.note: Public profile identifies him as founder and CEO at Savante focused on RL post-training open models.

primary.note: Company profile lists Savante's AI, reinforcement-learning, post-training, and agent specialties and includes him as founder and CEO.

secondary.label: Aryabhata paper
secondary.note: Research paper lists Sachin Dharashivkar as a co-author on Aryabhata, an exam-focused math reasoning model.

secondary.label: Luma Aryabhata event
secondary.note: Speaker page describes him as CEO of AthenaAgent and collaborator with PhysicsWallah on Aryabhata 1.0.
